title: Nolan's Anti Bedrock
description: With Nolan's Anti Bedrock it replaces the textures of Bedrock, Tuff, and Deepslate with my profile to prevent players from finding you base.
body:
# **Nolan's Anti Bedrock**
Have you every playing on a server and you take a screenshot of your base and your bedrock is exposed. Well in Minecraft, if someone has the seed they can you that exposed bedrock to find your bases cords. You can find this most happening on the Donut SMP or other related severs. But with Nolan's Anti Bedrock it replaces the textures of Bedrock, Tuff, Deepslate, Gavel, Stone, And othe blocks with my profile to prevent players from finding you base.
## Before Installing
![Before](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b573802abee2221f8405d900067c07f247076d9e.png)
## After Installing 
![After](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/afdfbe7190d9436a5e388f7e074bd786dda5c0a6.png)
## Coming Updates
A all version one for every block in the game.
## Notes
This resource pack is still in development and is only for Versions around 1.21 and I hope to make other versions and hopefully get in versions before Caves and Clifs Which is like 1.16 or whatever. I am also working on a every block version. For The newest versions I update it like once a week on [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/nolans-anti-bedrock/versions). If you want to support me someone send this to drdonut.
